title: Ponder Legacy
body:
> **"We're back! What's your name, new modpack?"**

> - "Ponder Legacy."

> "Thank you! Thank you!! Ponder Legacy has freed us!"

> - _"Ohhh, I wouldn't say free."_

> ### "More like under a new developer."


![Logo of Ponder Legacy with a steam locomotive next to it. Surrounded by nature.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38ad78f2d038ef9978da332a1c71225da21011c4.png)

# What is Ponder Legacy about?

## Ponder Legacy (As a Modpack) is a continuation of Create: Ponder by Haz. 
### The key focuses from the original remain centered on **performance** and the **Create Mod**. 

Where I deviate from the original is in its main indirect changes to **progression, polish, and general integration.**
- **There are no unnecessary changes to recipes to confuse you**, instead, all the original recipes are indirectly changed via the surrounding environment.

- **Instead of playing in one centralized location like in the original Create Mod**, you are heavily encouraged to **spread around and build outposts** for specific resources, mobs, and points of interest.

- **Enjoy all the popular add-ons for Create available on Fabric.** All integrated together!

- **Not just addons, even anything that fits Create (In my opinion)**, for example like: [Spelunkery!](https://modrinth.com/project/krskFMfA)
   Integrated to make the ore processing systems even more interesting with Create..

- The main difficulty is not in the actual recipes. **It's in the logistics surrounding them.**

- **Completing the End Portal is trickier** than: _Get Blaze rods, Ender Pearls, and you're done._
  **Here, you have to use the contents from every single mod to complete each eye.** You can not find them, only craft them one by one. _And what's the reward for getting access to The End? You will have to find out yourself._

_So.. If you enjoyed logistics in other packs and wished there was more focus on that. (Like me)_

**This pack is for you!** 

# What is this really about?

This pack is primarily for the members of Ponder Legacy...Even if it's intended for them, _that does not mean you can't play it yourself!_

**You will just have to deal with crippling loneliness..**

Don't wanna do that? Why not join?
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1OW5kjpyoxvTzjrKX4fdSxdxh13a1k2PykwErLZii94k/edit]






Original _Create: Ponder_ modpack assembled by **HazCantEatThis!**
